Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `CreateHandlersInterface`, `Factory`, `createFactory`, `createMiddleware`
+- Reads as: `../../hono`, `../../hono-base`, `../../types`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/websocket/index.ts`, `src/helper/testing/index.ts`, `src/helper/adapter/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating and combining Hono handlers and middleware with typed support for 1-10 handlers.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `matchedRoutes`, `routePath`, `baseRoutePath`, `basePath`
+- Reads as: `../../context`, `../../request/constants`, `../../types`, `../../utils/url`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/websocket/index.ts`, `src/helper/conninfo/index.ts`, `src/helper/testing/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Extracts routing information from matched routes including paths, base paths, and cache mechanisms.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `WSEvents`, `UpgradeWebSocket`, `WSContext`, `WSReadyState`, `SendOptions`, `defineWebSocketHelper`
+- Reads as: `../../context`, `../../types`, `../../utils/http-status`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/route/index.ts`, `src/helper/testing/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for Hono with event listeners and context control for upgrade and message handling.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `getCookie`, `getSignedCookie`, `generateCookie`, `setCookie`, `generateSignedCookie`, `setSignedCookie`, `deleteCookie`
+- Reads as: `../../context`, `../../utils/cookie`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/testing/index.ts`, `src/helper/adapter/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Cookie helpers for reading, writing, and managing signed cookies with security prefixes support.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `testClient`
+- Reads as: `../../client`, `../../context`, `../../hono`, `../../types`, `../../utils/types`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/testing/client.ts` (not in list)
+- Safe summary: Creates test HTTP client that wraps an Hono app for request/response testing.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `env`, `knownUserAgents`, `getRuntimeKey`, `checkUserAgentEquals`, `Runtime` type
+- Reads as: `../../context`, `../../utils/http-status`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/cookie/index.ts`, `src/helper/adapter/bun.ts` (not in list)
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection for different environments (Node, Deno, Bun, etc.) and environment variable access.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `createCssContext`, `css`, `cx`, `keyframes`, `viewTransition`, `Style`
+- Reads as: `../../helper/html`, `../../jsx/constants`, `../../jsx/dom/css`, `../../utils/html`, `./common`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/css/common.ts`, `src/helper/html/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS style helper with class generation, styling, and view transition support.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR`, `DEFAULT_STYLE_ID`, `minify`, `cssCommon`, `cxCommon`, `keyframesCommon`, `viewTransitionCommon`, `ClassNameSlug`, `OnInvalidSlug`
+- Reads as: (none - standalone utilities)
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/css/index.ts`, `src/helper/dom/css.ts` (not in list)
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities including class name generation, minification, and view transition support.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `proxy`, `RequestHeader` type, `ProxyRequestInit`, `ProxyFetch`
+- Reads as: `../../http-exception`, `../../utils/headers`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/adapter/index.ts`, `src/helper/streaming/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for proxying requests with RFC 9110 compliance for Connection header processing.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `inspectRoutes`, `showRoutes`, `getRouterName`
+- Reads as: `../../hono`, `../../types`, `../../utils/color`, `../../utils/handler`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/route/index.ts`, `src/helper/testing/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying Hono app routes with optional coloring.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `html`, `raw`
+- Reads as: `../../utils/html`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/html/index.ts`, `src/helper/css/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Template syntax helper for HTML with escaping and callback resolution support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: exports from `./ssg`, `ssgParams`, `isSSGContext`, `disableSSG`, `onlySSG` from `./middleware`
+- Reads as: `./ssg`, `./middleware`, `./plugins`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts`, `src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts`, `src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts` (not in list)
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation (SSG) helper for generating static HTML files from Hono apps.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `FileSystemModule`, `ToSSGResult`, `generateFilePath`, `fetchRoutesContent`, `saveContentToFile`, `toSSG`, `SSGPlugin`
+- Reads as: `./middleware`, `./utils`, `../../client/utils`, `../../hono`, `../../utils/concurrent`, `../../utils/mime`, `./plugins`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts`, `src/helper/ssg/utils.ts`
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic for fetching routes, generating content, and saving files to filesystem.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `dirname`, `joinPaths`, `filterStaticGenerateRoutes`, `isDynamicRoute`, `ensureWithinOutDir`
+- Reads as: `../../hono`, `../../router`, `../../utils/handler`, `./middleware`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts`, `src/helper/route/index.ts`
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path manipulation, route filtering, and dynamic route detection.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `stream`, `streamSSE`, `streamText`, `SSEStreamingApi`, `streamSSE` exports
+- Reads as: `./stream`, `./sse`, `./text`, `../../utils/stream`
+- Neighbor files: `src/helper/streaming/stream.ts`, `src/helper/streaming/sse.ts`, `src/helper/streaming/text.ts`
+- Safe summary: Main streaming index file routing to stream, SSE, and text streaming implementations.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: `stream`
+- Reads as: `../../conte
